text_original: Of all the dumb ai chat apps, it's among the least dumb. Really selling it, I know.
text_zh: 在所有那些愚蠢的 AI 聊天应用中，它算是不那么蠢的一个。我知道，这评价听起来真有吸引力。
reply_original: Haha, we will take "among the least dumb" as a huge compliment! Our team is working hard every day to make our characters even sharper and more intuitive for you. If you have any "big brain" ideas or feedback to help us improve further, feel free to reach out at support@fantachat.ai. Thanks for choosing Fantasia!
reply_zh: 哈哈，我们会把“最不笨”当作巨大的赞美！我们的团队每天都在努力工作，让角色为您变得更加敏锐和直观。如果您有任何“大智慧”的想法或反馈来帮助我们进一步改进，请随时通过 support@fantachat.ai 与我们联系。感谢您选择 Fantasia！
